top_signals.title: Japan’s Two-Year Bond Sale Sees Strong Demand on BOJ Caution
top_signals.summary: Japan’s two-year government bond auction Tuesday saw stronger demand than the 12-month average, reflecting concerns over the Bank of Japan’s policy path.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Trump bought as much as $5 million in Axon stock before ICE sought $220 million Taser deal
top_signals.summary: Axon Enterprise has ramped up lobbying in Congress on federal law enforcement technology as ICE pursues a potential $220 million Taser deal.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Congo Orders Cobalt Miners to Give Up Unused Export Quotas
top_signals.summary: Cobalt miners in the Democratic Republic of Congo will be required to surrender unused export quotas for the first half of the year to a government regulator.

top_signals.title: AeroVironment soars 19% on earnings beat, backlog grows to $1.2 billion
top_signals.summary: Dronemaker AeroVironment's autonomous system revenue beat expectations by $90 million and its backlog continued to grow.

top_signals.title: I’ve lived the American Dream but as the country turns 250 I’m watching it die
top_signals.summary: The American Dream is being snatched away by regressive economic policies and predatory capitalist practices that prioritise the interests of the ultra-wealthy over the well-being of the median American, says Lewis Liu I am the quintessential product of the American Dream. My first memory is of meeting my father at three and a half. I [...]
